case_title: SEN SEI VS. CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER,INC. ET AL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEI, SEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER,INC. RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LP THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT DEFENDANTS BREACHED ANY DUTY OWED TO PLAINTIFF OR THAT DEFENDANTS' CONDUCT CAUSED ANY LOSS, HARM OR DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF.
